actions: implemented local multimodal Skill package schema/reference builder
implemented visual state card and keyframe index outputs
implemented validation report that rejects runtime boundary drift
regenerated external capability registry and UI assets from generator output

pitfall_review.new_pitfall: MMSkills public snippets were visible while git/API checks returned 404, so repository visibility cannot be treated as authoritative runtime evidence.
pitfall_review.global_pitfall_log_reason: Project AGENTS boundary prohibits editing Workspace global control documents without separate confirmation.
pitfall_review.prevention_rule: When repository access is not authoritative, keep the decision at reference_only/schema_package_reference and do not claim runtime integration.

remaining_gap: MMSkills reference package evidence is not Campaign 3 acceptance, full UI workflow, Full Gate, EXE, or release.
